basic_details.short_information: The latest Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Group-C Posts! Published on 20 May 2026 at the official KEA website, this new recruitment drive offers 6 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18–45 years age group and possessing a 12th-pass or Degree qualification can apply online from 20 May 2026 to 03 June 2026. Find all details about the KEA Group-C Posts vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 750/- (Rs. 500 Application Fee + Rs. 250 Processing Fee)
application_fee.sc_fee: Rs. 500/- (Rs. 250 Application Fee + Rs. 250 Processing Fee)

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years. Max: 40 (General), 43 (2A, 2B, 3A, 3B), 45 (SC, ST, Cat-1) years.
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years for General Merit candidates. Maximum Age: 43 years for Category 2A, 2B, 3A, 3B candidates. Maximum Age: 45 years for SC, ST, Category-1 candidates. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for Ex-Servicemen, NCC Cadets, Rural Development Scheme Personnel, Persons with Disabilities, and Widows.

qualification.details: First Division Assistant: Degree from a University established by law in India. Equivalency of degree as per Govt. Circular No. CiAsuI 81 Sevane 2017, dated 27.02.2018. Second Division Assistant: PUC or equivalent qualification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 44425-83700 (First Division Assistant), Rs. 34100-67700 (Second Division Assistant)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KEA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KEA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for KEA Group-C posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Karnataka Examination Authority Group-C posts is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the KEA Group-C recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years. The maximum age limit is 40 years for General candidates, 43 years for categories 2A, 2B, 3A, 3B, and 45 years for SC, ST, and Category-1 candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for First Division Assistant?
faq.answer: For the First Division Assistant post, candidates must possess a Degree from a University established by law in India. Equivalency of the degree is as per the specified government circular.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Second Division Assistant?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Second Division Assistant post must have completed PUC or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for KEA Group-C posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Group-C posts in the Karnataka Examination Authority. This includes 2 vacancies for First Division Assistant and 4 vacancies for Second Division Assistant.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for KEA Group-C recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General and Other Categories pay Rs. 750, SC/ST/Cat-1/Ex-Servicemen pay Rs. 500, and Persons with Disabilities pay Rs. 250.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for KEA Group-C posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for KEA Group-C posts involves a Competitive Examination followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for First Division Assistant?
faq.answer: The pay scale for the First Division Assistant post is Rs. 44425-83700 per month, with specific increments detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for Second Division Assistant?
faq.answer: The pay scale for the Second Division Assistant post is Rs. 34100-67700 per month, with specific increments detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for KEA Group-C Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
